name: Chris Riccomini
tagline: Data infrastructure, Kafka, and software systems
description: Deep dives into data infrastructure, distributed systems, and software engineering from the creator of Materialized View.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Chris Riccomini, author of 'The Missing README' and creator of the Materialized View newsletter. He writes about data infrastructure, Kafka, distributed systems, and software engineering.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Chris Riccomini is known for opinionated takes on data infrastructure, cloud services, and the state of software systems. He has deep expertise in Kafka and distributed systems.
